description: Baseline: Cursor Composer 2.5 AMP plugin with 11 tools, 153 lines, comprehensive system prompt following GLM-5.2 pattern. All sections (operating_principles, frame_the_task, plan_before_acting, codebase_discovery, tool_use, implementation_style, frontend_taste, verification, communication) present and complete.

asi.hypothesis: A Cursor Composer 2.5 AMP plugin following the GLM-5.2 pattern with a comprehensive system prompt covering all key sections achieves a perfect prompt score.
asi.key_insight: The GLM-5.2 prompt structure is directly reusable for Cursor Composer 2.5 with minimal modifications — the operating principles, planning, codebase discovery, and verification sections are universal to good code agents.
asi.next_experiment: Try refining the tool selection — remove less common tools (painter, view_media) and add Cursor-specific tools if available
